summary: Completed end-to-end testing of Phase B Asset Intelligence layer (Marketplace 2.0). All backend endpoints, frontend UI components, and admin authoring interface tested successfully.

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: Single 502 error during initial test run, subsequent tests passed
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Retry on 502 - likely rate limiting or temporary gateway issue

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/assets/{id}/intelligence for 3 test assets (asset-podilskyi, asset-lavr-tc, asset-rivne-warehouse)
Backend: GET /api/assets/{id}/scenarios - returns 3 scenarios with correct ordering (bull > base > bear)
Backend: GET /api/assets/{id}/capital-stack - returns layers with percentages
Backend: GET /api/assets/{id}/journal - returns merged system events + authored milestones
Backend: GET /api/assets/{id}/metrics - returns funding/investor_count/secondary/payout/reports/occupancy
Backend: GET /api/assets/{id}/conviction - score 0-100, band, factors with weights summing to ~1.0
Backend: GET /api/assets/{id}/liquidity - score 0-10, signals
Backend: GET /api/assets/{id}/similar - returns similar assets
Backend: 404 handling for non-existent asset
Backend: Admin login with cookie-based session
Backend: GET /api/admin/assets/{id}/intelligence - returns thesis/capital_stack/occupancy/scenario_factors/defaults
Backend: PATCH /api/admin/assets/{id}/intelligence - updates occupancy_percent and scenario_factors, persists correctly
Backend: POST /api/admin/assets/{id}/journal - creates milestone with id
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/asset-journal/{milestone_id} - removes milestone
Backend: Auth guard - PATCH without cookie returns 401
Frontend: Public asset detail at /objects/asset-podilskyi loads without auth
Frontend: Intelligence panel renders with conviction ring (score 35/100) + liquidity ring (1.8/10) + live metrics
Frontend: Investment Thesis renders 4 cards (opportunity, market, execution, exit)
Frontend: Scenario Engine renders 3 scenario cards (Песимістичний, Базовий, Оптимістичний)
Frontend: Capital Stack waterfall bar + 4 layers render correctly
Frontend: 'Шлях активу' tab exists and clicking shows asset journal timeline with 8 items
Frontend: Similar assets grid renders at bottom with 5 items
Frontend: Admin login successful
Frontend: Admin asset content page loads at /admin/assets/asset-rivne-warehouse/content
Frontend: 'Marketplace 2.0' tab (data-testid='content-tab-intel') renders and is clickable
Frontend: Thesis textareas for all 4 fields (opportunity, market, execution, exit) render
Frontend: Capital stack number inputs for all 5 fields (asset_value, debt, platform, investors, reserve) render
Frontend: Occupancy input renders
Frontend: Scenario factor inputs for bear/base/bull (yield_factor, exit_factor) render
Frontend: Journal milestone add form renders (date, title, kind, body, add button)
Frontend: Save button (data-testid='intel-save') works - save successful with flash message 'Marketplace 2.0 збережено'
